calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ZACHARY SCOTT, ESQ., LITTLER MENDELSON, 415.276.2523.
ELLIOT BECKELMAN, ESQ., DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS, 415.703.4877, FOR RESPONDENT MIESHA BELL.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ZACHARY B. SCOTT, ESQ., LITTLER MENDELSON PC, COUNSEL FOR APPELLANT VISITACTION VALLEY COMMUNITY CENTER'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS GRANTED. Order signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Ntc Of Motion For Relief From Labor Code Section 98.2 (B)
Off Calendar Aug-16-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Zachary Scott, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, Tel. 415.276.2523, for Appellant/Defendant and moving party;
Elliot Beckelman, Esq. of the Dept. of Industrial Relations, Tel. 415.703.4877, for Respondent/Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court vacated its tentative ruling. APPELLANT VISITACION VALLEY COMMUNITY CENTER's Motion For Relief From Labor Code Section 98.2 (B) is Denied. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss The Appeal Of The Order Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner And Failure To Post
Off Calendar Aug-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elliot Beckelman, Esq. of the Dept. of Industrial Relations, Tel. 415.703.4877, for Respondent/Plaintiff and moving party;
Zachary Scott, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, Tel. 415.276.2523, for Appellant/Defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court vacated its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT MIESHA BELL's Motion To Dismiss The Appeal Of The Order Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner is Granted. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Ntc Of Motion For Relief From Labor Code Section 98.2 (B)
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Continued To Aug-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ZACHARY SCOTT OF LITTLER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 276-2523 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. ELLIOT BECKELMAN, TEL. NO. 703-4877 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - APPELLANT VISITACTION VALLEY COMMUNITY CENTER'S Motion For Relief From Labor Code Section 98.2 (B) IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 16, 2012. OPPOSITION TO BE FILED BY JULY 20, 2012.
The moving party provided courtesy copies of the moving papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B at the hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
